reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text:
So bad and disappointing. 
1/ Check-in, check-out takes too long and is cumbersome. 
2/ Disturbing guests: I booked 2 rooms and both were disturbed. Room 1: a staff member knocked on the door without saying anything and opened the door casually. When they realized there was a guest inside, they did not apologize and left silently. Room 2 was similar, the staff knocked casually and asked to check the mini bar around noon!!! Very unsettling. 
3/ Restaurant staff are unprofessional and rude. Guests checking in at the front desk held extra money for breakfast and other services, but after breakfast, the staff still insisted on separate payment and said they had not received any information... It was rude for staff to announce that breakfast was not booked while guests were having their meal and asked for confirmation. I explained that I did not pay attention when booking and that the front desk kept extra money and clearly said it was for paying for breakfast or other services at checkout... The staff did not check back with the front desk but asked the guests while they were dining, which was very impolite. 
4/ Room rates are too high compared to before the name change and the services are not equivalent. 
5/ I will not return in the future.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi chị Van, 

Trước tiên, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những trải nghiệm của mình. Chúng tôi vô cùng tiếc nuối khi biết rằng dịch vụ tại khách sạn đã không đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của chị, và xin gửi lời xin lỗi sâu sắc về những bất tiện mà chị đã gặp phải.

Những vấn đề chị đề cập, từ quy trình nhận/trả phòng, sự thiếu tế nhị trong việc phục vụ tại phòng và nhà hàng, đến sự không nhất quán trong thông tin, đều không đi đúng với những tiêu chuẩn mà chúng tôi cam kết mang lại. Chúng tôi đã nghiêm túc xem xét và chuyển tiếp các phản hồi này đến các bộ phận liên quan để cải thiện ngay lập tức.

Chúng tôi hiểu rằng những trải nghiệm không như ý đã ảnh hưởng đến sự hài lòng của chị. Hy vọng trong tương lai, chúng tôi sẽ có cơ hội được phục vụ chị một lần nữa, để chứng minh sự nỗ lực không ngừng của chúng tôi trong việc nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.

Nếu chị có thêm ý kiến hoặc yêu cầu, xin vui lòng liên hệ trực tiếp với chúng tôi. Rất mong nhận được sự thô

Cleaner - oh my OCD was dancing how this guy cleaned the rooms. Forgot his name but room 903-904 amazing job 🙏. Room service - you called they came in less then 5 minutes. reviews.title: Disappointing stay!
reviews.text:
Bed sheets were never changed even after days of housekeeping! Able to tell since the day of checked in as there were stains on sheet that were still there after housekeeping so they merely made the bed up.

Shower hose design was not user friendly and complicated, the water runs out after a few mins in for a few seconds then comes back on again, repeatedly. 

For an international chain under the IHG group, the staff here definitely needs more training and language skills as it’s hard to communicate and converse due to the language barrier and accents on both sides.

Bonus: Beer opener was nowhere to be seen in the room!

reviews.title: Great Visit with Disappointed Experience
reviews.text:
JW Marriott Saigon Suites is undoubtedly a good property with comfortable rooms and a very good breakfast spread, which initially left us happy and satisfied. The check-in experience was also pleasant. However, unfortunately, the overall experience was seriously marred by the attitude and behavior of certain staff members.

The most disappointing incident occurred on 31st December at around 11:58 PM at the pool bar, involving Mr. Sang. He abruptly and rudely stopped us from entering the main lawn, from where my 7-year-old daughter could have witnessed the New Year fireworks. There was absolutely no empathy, no courtesy, and no willingness to understand that this once-a-year midnight moment can never be brought back—especially for a child.

His behavior was shockingly rude. The way he physically blocked my wife and daughter from stepping onto the lawn, with cold and unpleasant facial expressions, is something I will never forget. It felt as if access to an open garden was being denied purely because we had not purchased tickets for the New Year celebration. This approach was insensitive, rigid, and completely against the hospitality standards one expects from a brand like JW Marriott.

What makes this experience even more disappointing is that no one from the hotel management reached out to us afterward. In other reputed hotels across countries, when staff members make such mistakes or encounter serious guest dissatisfaction, they proactively report the incident to their General Manager, who personally reaches out to the guest to calm the situation and restore trust. Unfortunately, nothing of that sort happened here—no apology, no acknowledgment, and no attempt to understand or correct the damage caused.

Additionally, during breakfast on other days, we noticed a few staff members displaying unhappy and frustrated expressions, which further affected the overall dining experience and guest comfort.

Despite being a loyal member, such incidents force me to seriously reconsider my choices in the future. Next time I travel to another country, I would prefer exploring other brands or properties that value basic human courtesy, empathy, and guest emotions, rather than rigid rules and indifferent behavior.

Well done, Mr. Sang, for turning what should have been a magical New Year moment for a child into a bitter and unforgettable disappointment.

reviews.title: FABULOUS Stay in Ho Chi Minh City
reviews.positives: We loved our stay at the JW Marriott Residences!! We had a beautifully updated and well laid out king one bedroom apartment with a balcony. Immaculate, spacious and well furnished with utensils, fridge, washer dryer. Bottled water was left by housekeeping every day. We did not have a chance to use the gym or the pool but they both looked very nice. The staff at both the Residences and the Hotel are so helpful and friendly. Buffet breakfast at the Hotel was delicious - with many western and Asian options. High quality food including an amazing coffee bar. Also available was an a la carte breakfast at the restaurant in the Residences building. The two buildings are connected by retail space which included a convenience store, several casual restaurants and a bank. We loved the location. Just a few blocks away from the very busy main streets. It was a relaxing and peaceful place to return to. We would absolutely stay here again and highly recommend!!
reviews.negatives: We loved everything about the property.

reviews.title: Staff working with Scam taxis
reviews.text:
The staffs are working together with the rip off taxi to rip off guests! Especially the concierge. They will tell you that grab is unavailable due to various reasons and keep hard selling you rip off taxi. 

I would have expected better from a 5 star hotel!
reviews.response:
Dear Terence, 

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay with us. 

First and foremost, we would like to apologize for any inconvenience throughout your stay. After receiving your notification of this incident, we have investigated operation activities to find out reason. 

Due to the annual Marathon event that hosted by the city on your departure date, some roads had been blocked and there was a temporarily prohibit the circulation of vehicles entering the route Le Duan Street to ensure traffic order and safety for the runners during the race. Therefore, the Grab Car Service were not available at the time. 

Please accept our sincerest apologies for the miscommunications and the disturbance you have experienced. We will share your feedback with the team to make the necessary improvements. We do hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future, so that we can provide a better experience.

Sincerely,
Justin Malcolm 
General Manager

reviews.title: A good hotel located in 1st Army.
reviews.text:
The location isn't the best, but it's still in a decent area since it's in the first district. The facilities are all clean and good. I really liked that the bathroom was spacious.

The inconveniences were.. 
1. The hair dryer cord was too short, and it was hard to press the button; my fingers hurt.
2. No one informed us about the pool construction schedule, so after changing into my swimsuit, I had to go back upstairs and couldn't use the pool at all. This was really disappointing.
3. The breakfast was not as good as I expected. I heard quite a few positive things about the breakfast; is it really that good? I couldn't find any particularly tasty items, and the decaf coffee was only Americano, which didn't taste good.

There are a few downsides, but overall the condition was good, and the location is nice, so if I go to Ho Chi Minh, I will consider staying here again.

reviews.title: Quiet luxury
reviews.text: The Intercontinentals have aged somewhat as a chain, but the one in Ho Chi Minh City has aged well. Needless to say the hotel is EXTREMELY expensive in local terms, but for business travelers it's a nice choice.

My husband and son enjoyed their gym facilities.  They spent at least 3 hours every day in working out their bodies and relaxing themselves in the changing room. However, the swimming pool is relatively small and is unable  to fullfil the hotel guests during CNY peak season - too crowd.

Breakfast in Market 39 cafe has many varieties.  We won't miss it every morning.

Concierge staff is friendly and patience especially when dealing with high demanding guests.  They remained claim and professional.

reviews.negatives: room was extremely disappointing , no black out curtains, bathroom sliding  door slides open itself, bathtub leaked, in room temperature much too cold, temperature control not working so eg. setting at 25 but temp keeps at 22 even if set at 27 or higher, room always at 23/22, cold, cold & uncomfortable all the time, had to keep turning the a/c off to let the temp go up then get out of bed to turn on again, & off & on all the time in order to keep the temp. comfortable. Really really upsetting! Shower water temp not consistant, goes v v hot then back to personal setting , suddenly scalding & have to step away then back again. Was not told the pool/sauna etc. facilities under renovation at time of booking, otherwise would not have booked. Closet not lighted from inside as expected based on all modern hotels, door closer not tightened well so doors slam very loudly. Loud music late into the night from the rooftop nightclub made sleep v difficult on Saturday night. Overall extremely disappointed in the low level JW Marriot management seems to have sunk. Never again! Good sleep & gd shower fundamental to any hotel, both failed here.

reviews.title: Modern comforts in Ho Chi Minh City
reviews.positives: After 13 days travelling from north to south Vietnam we wanted a hotel that we knew would be comfortable with a bit of luxury for the last four nights of the holiday. Therefore we compromised on a historic building type of hotel and opted for modern comforts. We booked a corner room which was very light and airy and had a view over the swimming pool. The staff were fabulous, always attentive and knowledgeable. Breakfast was amazing with the biggest selection of food we came across in all the different places we stayed in. We used the pool each afternoon after the 34 degree heat of HCMC to cool down a little - pool is a great size. We ate out apart from breakfast at great vegetarian/vegan restaurants nearby - one to definitely recommend is La Moi about 5 minutes walk away. In addition to a lounge/bar the ground floor of the hotel has a small convenience store, Vietnamese fast food outlets and an Italian restaurant which you can charge to the room - we had a great pizza from here. I'd definitely recommend this hotel.
reviews.negatives: Nothing we really enjoyed our stay.

reviews.title: Great Suite
reviews.text: The hotel is brand new, tastefully furnished and ticks all the boxes for us. The facilities are beautiful and service almost faultless (apart from the details above). The chinese restaurant is beautiful however very over-priced. They seem to have spent a long time thinking about the little details to make your stay more enjoyable, fruit, a welcome gift, Ipod dock, TV in the bathroom etc etc
reviews.positives: The Intercontinental Club Lounge on the 19th floor was excellent (apart from the over-attentiveness)
reviews.negatives: Staff a little over-attentive. We stayed with our (very temperamental) baby who cried a lot during our visit and the staff tended to over-fuss which was exactly the opposite of what we needed. This made an already stressful situation more stressful. This is typical of SE Asian hospitality however a lot of Westerners do not want such fussing, unfortunately the staff appear unable to 'read' the guests and hold back a little when the attention is not wanted.

reviews.title: Excellent location
reviews.negatives: Staff were lovely on arrival at check in. The corner room had a lovely view, although I was hoping for a higher floor. Organised club access in advance for our last evening and staff were absolutely fabulous and food was delicious, only comment would be that it wasn’t as a relaxed an atmosphere as I am used to with club rooms, I was expecting more lounge/ casual seating areas , but then again this hotel is geared to business people. Also organised a late check out as our flight was at 9.30 pm , which was greatly appreciated on such a warm day being able to relax in our room as opposed to in the foyer or by the pool. Breakfast had an amazing selection , for both my omnivore husband and myself as a vegetarian, the friendly staff helped me find all the available green options. Also had a transfer to the airport and our driver, and I apologise for not getting his name, was AMAZING, got us there safely in Saigon’s crazy Friday night traffic in a timely manner. Location is in the heart of district 1 attractions, literally across the road from book street that I recommend a stroll down. As a lap swimmer the length, and cleanliness of the pool was appreciated. Would recommend this hotel and would return . Thank you to all staff for a Lovely stay.

reviews.title: Convenient hotel with good facilities
reviews.text:
Fuss free check-in/check out since already booked through Agoda. Great BF selection, including many kinds of local coffee which some guests liked. Several pillow types where you could ask for &for comfort without extra charges. Most of the front line service staff attitude was excellent, giving directions, recommending where to go, reply promptly to my requests, communication in english was no issue.

However there was one incident where we wanted to look for a chinese restaurant but we couldn't spell the name properly. The customer service staff tried their best to help & ask their manager. He also tried but got a little irritated after a while when we said this wasn't the restuarant we wanted. In the end, he just said this is the only restaurant with similar name & left. So we arrived at this restaurant & found it wrong. Luckily the staff there knew where the restaurant is & was able to guid us there. Thumbs up for the staff
reviews.positives: Excellent attitude from some service staffs

reviews.title: I am satisfied.
reviews.text:
Since it was an early morning arrival flight, I was able to check my luggage in early. At that time, I also had lounge access, so I utilized the lounge. 
The room was very clean, but I had one complaint. Since it was a connecting room, I could hear quite a bit of noise from the room next door. Given the level of the hotel, the sound leakage was disappointing. 
Aside from the noise leakage, I had no complaints at all. 
Thank you very much.

reviews.title: One full week in HCMC
reviews.text: We had a great visit.  The location was great. HCMC is a busy place. The restaurants connected to the mall were also well priced and even gave us a hotel guest discount. The concierge staff was very engaging. We found the food was good. One thing they could have is just a black coffee station for normal coffee. It would alleviate the team constantly making special coffee for the 50plus guests. I will say though without them we would have never tried salt coffee. Turned into a day tour and enjoyed the rest of our trip.

reviews.title: The hotel is not child-friendly.
reviews.text:
1. We had to pay an additional service fee for 3 children during our stay here, but the hotel could not provide slippers or toiletries for the children. They only had supplies for adults. This is a significant oversight by the management team. These are potential future loyal customers of yours.  
2. The breakfast restaurant staff were very attentive and hospitable.  
3. The cashier at the lobby bar has a very strange way of rounding up the bill. If the bill comes to an odd number of 10 dong, they round it up to 1000 dong and simply charge the customer 1000 dong. This is a very small amount of money, but it reflects the honesty and kindness of a large hotel. If I travel with my family and children, I will definitely not return here.
reviews.response:
Xin chào anh Hieu, 

Cám ơn anh đã dành thời gian chia sẻ về trải nghiệm của mình tại InterContinental Saigon.

Lời đầu tiên, chúng tôi xin được gửi lời xin lỗi chân thành nhất vì những trải nghiệm không hài lòng của anh tại đây. Những chia sẻ cũng như góp ý của anh đã được Ban Lãnh Đạo của khách sạn thảo luận để có những phương án cải tiến kịp thời. Cảm ơn anh đã đưa ra những chia sẻ và đóng góp, đây là động lực quý báu giúp chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cấp chất lượng của mình nhằm mang đến những dịch vụ tốt nhất.

Một lần nữa, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn sự tin chọn của anh với InterContinental Saigon, đồng thời hy vọng lại sẽ có cơ hội được mang đến những trải nghiệm tốt hơn cho anh trong thời gian sắp tới.

Trân trọng,
Justin Malcolm 
Tổng Quản Lý

reviews.title: Clean, city center
reviews.text: The staff are kind. The hotel is in the city center; and is situated inside a mall. The breakfast is not a buffet, and it's located inside a restaurant that is on the opposite side of the mall. The manager did permit the breakfast to be delivered to my room, so that might be an option for those that are in a hurry, or not keen on going for a long walk. In regards to the interior, these corporate hotels have become so monotonous; they lack individuality and self expression. Their architect & engineer was clearly not permitted to engage in any creativity. It's a bit sad.

reviews.title: best hotel in hcmc, outstanding service
reviews.text: We came to Intercontinental Asiana Saigon for the 2nd time. After staying here collectively for 8 nights in 2 separate trips, we feel this is definitely one of the best hotels we've ever stayed in. Service staff are very helpful and you will always be greeted with a smile, from the main doors of the hotel, to the concierge, to the fitness centre etc. We requested for change of pillows and duvet, and within a couple of minutes from the phone call, it was done. Rooms are spacious and comfortable. Shopping malls, namely Diamond Plaza and Vincom Center are both a 3-5 minute walk away. Hotel is very clean, swimming pool and fitness centre are great. You won't have to worry about getting fleeced when taking a taxi from there. Overall, a reasonable price to pay for one of the best hotels, and we'll return for sure.

reviews.title: Great Hotel
reviews.text: I stayed at the InterContinental Asiana Saigon for two nights while in Ho Chi Min City for business and really enjoyed it.   It is truly a five star hotel and exceeded my expectations.  The hotel is a little over a year old and was very nicely appointed.   I stayed on the club level and enjoyed the free early evening drinks and nice breakfast at the club level lounge.  The rooms were very nice and had a great view of the city.  The bed was very comfortable and the shower had exceptional water pressure.  The club level room also came with free wifi that was relatively fast.  The room had a large flat screen tv and plenty of English channels.  The hotel is a little far away from the river and the central shops but still close enough to walk to if you have the time (and the courage to cross the street with a million mopeds zooming by).   There is a good Italian restaurant on the other side of the hotel in the lobby of the InterContinental Residences that I would have never found if I was not told about it by the people I was meeting with on business.  For some reason they do not advertise it on the hotel side of the building.  There is also a Hard Rock Café right next to the hotel which has live bands every night at 9pm.  Overall, I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone traveling to Ho Chi Min City and hope to one day to return.
reviews.positives: True Five Star Hotel, Great Room, Pool, Club Leve!

reviews.title: Nice stay!
reviews.text: I booked a deluxe king room and stayed here with my mom for 4 nights.  The room has a nice view and spacious ( we have 5-6 pieces of luggages.  This hotel is within walking distance to shops,restaurants or a short Grab ride to anywhere.  Staffs are very helpful and friendly.  If they see me carry heavy stuffs, they will offer help (definitely the feeling of a 5 stars hotel).  I think the cleaning team is a bit weaker (forgot small towels or toilet paper).  We stayed for 4 nights and a member so they gave us free laundry but only 3 pieces/day which is nice ( they did great work with laundry… thoughtful and elegant of how they return the clothes).  But my mom and I are women, each of us will use 4 pieces/day.  I hope the hotel will increase the number of laundry pieces to 8 per day for 2 guests or have washer and dryer machines in the hotel ( there are laundromats outside that offer 40,000 vnd/kg but not convenient to carry out).  Breakfast buffet is very good. They have smoke salmon that I like, many different types of fresh juices 👍.   The Pho is mediocre compared to other hotels  ( the soup was salty and lacking the real taste of Pho).  Their sweet options are good with danish, coconut tart, croissants…. I wish they offer small pieces of cakes.  The gym has many equipments for workout, sauna ( dry and wet) 👍.  The gym floor is a bit old need to update.  In general we had a good stay, the bed was comfy and clean 💕

reviews.title: Excellent hotel
reviews.text:
We were welcomed with such wonderful smiles and swept up to the Club Floor immediately by a  lovely  guest relations lady. When she brought us to our room(with an upgrade ) we were wowed by the view from our corner suite. Amenities were excellent and smelled so good. All the staff were always smiling, greeting us and took such good care of us always.  The food tasted so good too and the presentation was elegant.
We didn't want to leave the hotel because we were so pampered.  The concierge always knew where I wanted to go even though I gave her vague descriptions.  We look forward to another stay at InterCon Saigon!
reviews.positives: Location was great, service was wonderful, room was beautiful
